creator: david@fiander.info
text:
The description of the rc.conf variable ip6addrctl_enable contains the only documentation for the variable ip6addrctl_policy (which is another problem, but I'm not going to open a but report for that).

The description of the ip6addrctl_policy says:

If ``ipv4_prefer'' or ``ipv6_prefer'' is specified, ip6addrctl(8) installs a pre-defined policy table described in Section 2.1 (IPv6-preferred) or 10.3 (IPv4-preferred) of RFC 3484.

A strict reading of this suggests that setting ip6addrctl_policy to "ipv4_prefer" will install a "pre-defined policy table described in Section 2.1 (IPv6-preferred)". The second part of this sentence needs to be reversed so that the correct tables correspond to the correct policy values.
